economic_notes: Nation owns a townhouse and condominium rented to related family members. Saaiyouck Development Corporation investigates and pursues business opportunities in traditional territories. A-Tlegay Fisheries Limited Partnership manages fishing licences and quota. Related party 0986442 BC Ltd. trades in cryptocurrency.
notes: Audit is qualified due to no approved budget being prepared for the year ended March 31, 2022. Nation accounts for A-Tlegay Fisheries Limited Partnership (12.99%) and Saaiyouck Development Corporation (100%) using modified equity method. ISC funding calculated as revenue line of $185,960; total government transfers includes ISC $185,960 plus Kwakiutl District Council $5,150 plus Province of BC $243,805 = $434,915. London Enterprises Ltd. $25,000 recognized from deferred revenue originally received in 2017 for land access over 10 years to 2027. Segment disclosure table appears mirrored/reversed in source but figures reconcile to statement of operations. No remuneration schedule provided.
